caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and clothing on racks and mannequins in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as he talks. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red and white logo that reads "DOPE FLY TOT" on the right. The background remains static, while the man's head and mouth move slightly, capturing a continuous moment of him speaking during a recording or broadcast session.
